milestoneBenefits.reward: 3 months of OTTplay subscription at ₹1 plus a ₹250 Woohoo voucher

faqTemplateAnswers.Is this card lifetime free?: Yes, it has zero joining fee and zero annual fee for life.
faqTemplateAnswers.Is it worth it?: Yes, especially as a first credit card or credit-builder — since it's issued against a small fixed deposit with no income proof needed, it's a low-risk, no-cost way to build a credit history, though the reward rate and overall benefits are modest.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should get this card?: First-time credit card users, students, homemakers, or anyone without formal income proof who wants to build a credit score using a fixed deposit as security.
faqTemplateAnswers.Does it support UPI?: Yes, it can be linked to UPI apps for payments.
faqTemplateAnswers.Can I get lounge access with this card?: No, this card does not offer complimentary airport lounge access.
faqTemplateAnswers.What income is required to qualify?: None — no income proof is required. The card is secured against a fixed deposit (minimums cited range from roughly ₹5,000 to ₹10,000+), with the credit limit set at up to 90% of the FD amount.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should avoid this card?: Spenders who want strong ongoing rewards or lounge access, or anyone who doesn't want to lock money into a fixed deposit to get a credit line.
faqTemplateAnswers.What are the best alternatives?: SBI SimplyCLICK or Axis ACE if you can qualify with income proof and want stronger rewards; another FD-backed option is the SBI Card Unnati.
